data.title: BKV Corporation Announces Timing of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call Details
data.description: Denver-based company BKV Corporation (NYSE: BKV) will release its first quarter operational and financial results on Thursday, May 7, 2026, before the markets open. A conference call to discuss these results will be held at 10:00 a.m. ET on the same day. Those interested can join the call by dialing (877) 407-0779 for US participants or (201) 389-0914 for international participants. It is advised to dial in early to prevent any delays.

data.title: Essential Utilities to Report Financial Results for Q1 2026
data.description: Essential Utilities (NYSE: WTRG) of Bryn Mawr, Pennsylvania, plans to release its earnings report for the quarter ending March 31, 2026, before the market opens on May 7, 2026. A conference call with financial analysts is scheduled for the same day at 11 a.m. Eastern Time. Interested parties can tune in to the live webcast of the call and presentation by visiting Essential.co and selecting the Investors link. The webcast will also be available for later viewing in the Investor Relations section.

data.title: Vero AI Reports Q1 Momentum, Expands AI Audit Capabilities, Names Chief Strategy Officer
data.description: Vero AI, a company based in Raleigh, North Carolina, announced significant progress in Q1 2026. They have developed new features that allow audit teams to conduct audit testing on multiple samples simultaneously. This innovation provides audit-ready outcomes within minutes and includes complete traceability. The technology enables auditing at a step-by-step level, contributing to more efficient and accurate processes.

data.title: Polymath Partners with Africa123 to Bring Tokenized Land Infrastructure to Global Capital Markets
data.description: A collaboration is underway to tokenize over 400 million square meters of land in Africa with the aim of leveraging global capital and supporting advanced urban infrastructure. Polymath, a prominent provider of digital asset infrastructure for institutions, revealed this strategic initiative in Toronto on April 16, 2026.

data.title: Big Ten Network Expands Super Slo-Mo Replay to More Sports with TVU Networks; Establishes Bonded IP as Critical Hot Backup and Early Access Network
data.description: TVU Networks has introduced its RPS platform, providing enhanced super slow-motion capabilities for a greater number of collegiate sports events. This platform not only acts as a robust backup to fiber but also serves as an early-venue connectivity solution. The announcement was made in Cupertino, California on April 16, 2026. The Big Ten Network (BTN) is already leveraging the TVU RPS platform for its operations. This initiative highlights the growing trend towards utilizing innovative technology in sports broadcasting.

data.title: JinkoSolar Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: In Shangrao, China, on April 16, 2026, JinkoSolar Holding Co., Ltd. ("JinkoSolar"), a prominent player in clean energy technology, disclosed its unaudited financial figures for Q4 and full year concluding on December 31, 2025. The company, listed on NYSE as JKS, shared details about their performance for the mentioned periods.

data.title: Vipshop Filed 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: Vipshop Holdings Limited, a prominent online discount retailer for brands in China, based in Guangzhou, made an announcement on April 16, 2026. The company (NYSE: VIPS) disclosed the filing of its annual report on Form 20-F, which contains the audited financial statements. Vipshop is known for providing significant discounts on various products and has a strong presence in the Chinese market. The annual report provides detailed insights into the company's financial performance and key metrics for investors and stakeholders. This filing showcases Vipshop's commitment to transparency and adherence to regulatory requirements.

data.title: ActBlue Announces Strongest First Quarter in Organization History
data.description: Democratic donor momentum is on the rise ahead of the midterms, as indicated by recent results despite ongoing Republican distractions. ActBlue, a leading campaign tool provider, revealed that small-dollar donors pooled an impressive $568 million for Democratic candidates. This surge in support showcases significant support for the party as they gear up for the upcoming elections.

data.title: Infinix Launches Global "Night Safari" Contest Showcasing NOTE 60 SERIES' Authentic Night Photography
data.description: Participate in the #NightSafariWithNOTE60Series for a chance to win the NOTE 60 Pro! Infinix has launched the global contest on April 16, 2026, encouraging mobile photography lovers to capture authentic night scenes. Take part now for the opportunity to win this exciting prize.

data.title: Capital Square's The Nickel Hotel Wins 2026 CoStar Impact Award for Charleston Commercial Development of the Year
data.description: In Charleston, South Carolina on April 16, 2026, Capital Square, a prominent sponsor specializing in tax-advantaged real estate investments and a nationwide developer and manager of housing communities, revealed that The Nickel Hotel has clinched the prestigious title of Charleston's 2026 CoStar Impact Award recipient. This recognition serves as a testament to the outstanding contributions made by The Nickel Hotel towards the real estate sector in the city.

data.title: Spectrum Science Appoints Lisa Talbot to Lead Communications Business
data.description: Talbot has been appointed as President of Spectrum Science Communications, with a primary focus on driving growth, enhancing integrated communications services, and revolutionizing healthcare storytelling in the modern era. This announcement was made in Washington on April 16, 2026. Spectrum Science is an independent, full-service organization dedicated to this transformation, and under Talbot's leadership, it aims to achieve significant milestones in these areas.

data.title: OceanaGold Provides Notice of First Quarter 2026 Results, Conference Call, and 2026 Annual Meeting of the Shareholders
data.description: In Vancouver, BC on April 16, 2026, OceanaGold Corporation (TSX: OGC) (NYSE: OGC) announced that it will unveil its operational and financial performance for the initial quarter of 2026 post-market closure on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. The Company's results will be accessible on...

data.title: Defense Metals Announces Inclusion in New Sprott Rare Earths Ex-China ETF
data.description: Defense Metals Corp., a company listed on the TSXV under the ticker symbol DEFN, on the OTCQB as DFMTF, and on the FSE as 35D, is currently concentrating on advancing the Wicheeda Rare Earth Project near Prince George, British Columbia, Canada.
